The Prince & Me (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,165,882Details
International Box Office $1,923,228
Worldwide Box Office $30,089,110
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,406,378 (33.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.99 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:93.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$30,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,682 opening theaters/2,711 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $54,245,405

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: April 2nd, 2004 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: June 24th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: August 10th, 2004 by Paramount Home Video, released as The Prince and Me
MPA Rating: PG for some sex-related material and language
Running Time: 111 minutes
Franchise: Prince & Me
Plot point: Medical Students, Prince/Princess, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Royalty
Social setting: College
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Target audience: Tween
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States, Czech Republic
Languages: English, Danish, German
